vibe: Expensive, cinematic, moody, elegant, bespoke, high-end editorial

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F4F0E6]

typography.guidelines: Headings must use Playfair Display and should NOT be bold; use font-light or font-normal. Body text must use Manrope. Subtitles/labels should be uppercase with wide letter-spacing. Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetric layouts, bento box grids with breathing room. Avoid perfect symmetry to create an editorial, artistic feel.
spacing_and_layout.guidelines: Use generous spacing. For hero, allow the image to breathe. Use negative space to emphasize luxury.

header.style: Sticky top, crystal glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B0C0B]/60 border-b border-[#252825]. Navigation must be visible on desktop. Elegant brand text on left, links in center, primary CTA on right.

hero.style: Cinematic. Large hero image with max bg-black/40 overlay. Text must be readable. Include an elegant overline, massive H1, and primary CTA.

cards_services.style: Moody and tactile. bg-[#161A18] with 1px border-[#252825]. Do not use heavy box-shadows. On hover: border tints slightly gold, image inside scales up slowly.
cards_services.image: Images should have max-h-[60vh] to avoid overwhelming the screen. Use object-cover.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A059] text-[#0B0C0B] px-8 py-3 rounded-none font-medium hover:bg-[#DFBB73] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C5A059] text-[#C5A059] px-8 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#C5A059] hover:text-[#0B0C0B] transition-colors

forms.style: Use Shadcn components but override styling. Inputs should be dark: bg-[#121413] border-[#252825] focus:border-[#C5A059] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C5A059]. Text should be #F4F0E6.

footer.style: Massive padding py-32. Border top border-[#252825]. Big typographic brand name text-[8vw] at the bottom in Playfair Display.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Images inside containers should have scale-105 duration-700 ease-in-out on container hover. Borders transition to a subtle gold.
interactions_and_motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Entrance animations should be subtle fade-ups with 0.8s duration.
interactions_and_motion.links: Underline expand on hover or color shift to gold.

hero_background.description: Opulent moody floral arrangement with deep red peonies and dark purple orchids, cinematic lighting.

wedding_service.description: High-end bespoke bridal bouquet with cream roses and white anemones against silk wedding dress.

funeral_sympathy.description: Elegant white, purple, and green floral sympathy wreath for premium funeral service.

premium_bouquets.description: Massive, luxurious gift bouquet on a dark marble table, wrapped in premium matte paper.

about_storefront.description: Elegant dark storefront of the flower shop.

gallery_images.description: Dark red orchids illuminated by spotlight.
Dark red orchids and roses arrangement.

testing_and_accessibility.attributes: All interactive elements, forms, and navigation links MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast or uses drop shadows. Do not use fully transparent headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and Jewel & Luxury archetype. Avoid 'cheap' brightly colored UI elements.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Manrope for body text. Install these via Google Fonts.
Build custom asymmetric grids for the Services and Gallery sections using raw Tailwind classes, prioritizing generous spacing (py-24 or py-32).
The hero section should feature the moody floral image with a subtle overlay, never exceeding bg-black/40.
Implement the bespoke consultation form using Shadcn but customize it to fit the dark luxury theme.
Include a marquee or elegant slider for testimonials, keeping typography low-contrast and refined.
Ensure all images are sourced from the provided media URLs, with no generic placeholder URLs used.
